---
title: "Huiru Yang"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:huy017@ucsd.edu
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rsm-huy017
---

Hello! I’m Huiru Yang, a Master of Science in Business Analytics student at UC San Diego.

I’m interested in data analysis, business strategy, and applying analytics to real-world decision making. My background includes accounting, operations, and project coordination, and I’m currently building stronger skills in data science and business analytics.

## Skills
- Data analysis
- Business analytics
- Excel / SQL / R
- Project coordination
- Communication

## Interests
- Marketing analytics
- Consumer behavior
- Operations and supply chain
- Business intelligence
